curricula.name: CS224W: Machine Learning with Graphs
curricula.description: Analysis of large-scale graph and network data. Graph neural networks, knowledge graphs, and applications to social networks, biology, and recommendation systems.

curricula.name: CS224N: Natural Language Processing with Deep Learning
curricula.description: Deep learning approaches to NLP. Word vectors, neural networks, transformers, pretraining, and applications to machine translation, question answering, and text generation.

curricula.name: CS231N: Deep Learning for Computer Vision
curricula.description: Convolutional neural networks and their applications in computer vision. Image classification, object detection, segmentation, generative models, and visual understanding.

curricula.name: CS229: Machine Learning
curricula.description: Broad introduction to machine learning. Supervised learning, unsupervised learning, reinforcement learning, and learning theory with mathematical foundations.

curricula.name: STATS 315A: Modern Applied Statistics — Learning
curricula.instructor: Trevor Hastie, Robert Tibshirani, John Duchi
curricula.description: Advanced applied statistics focusing on modern learning methods. Covers clustering, dimensionality reduction, spectral methods, matrix decomposition, and their applications to genomics, information retrieval, and recommender systems.

curricula.name: STATS 361: Causal Inference
curricula.description: Foundations of causal inference from observational and experimental data. Covers potential outcomes, randomized experiments, propensity scores, instrumental variables, regression discontinuity, and modern machine learning approaches to heterogeneous treatment effects.

curricula.name: Explainable AI: Interpretability and Explainability in Machine Learning
curricula.instructor: Hima Lakkaraju, Cynthia Rudin, Been Kim, Christoph Molnar
curricula.description: 설명 가능한 AI(XAI)와 해석 가능한 머신러닝의 이론, 방법론, 평가를 체계적으로 다루는 커리큘럼. Harvard CS 282BR, Cambridge L193, UW CSE 574 등 저명 대학 강의와 핵심 서베이 논문을 기반으로 구성하였다.

curricula.name: Reinforcement Learning: From Foundations to Deep RL and Beyond
curricula.instructor: Sergey Levine, Emma Brunskill, David Silver, Ruslan Salakhutdinov
curricula.description: 강화학습의 이론적 기초부터 심층 강화학습, 그리고 최신 응용까지 체계적으로 다루는 커리큘럼. Berkeley CS285, Stanford CS234, DeepMind/UCL RL 강의, CMU 10-703 등 세계 최고 대학의 강의와 분야를 정의한 핵심 논문들을 기반으로 구성하였다. MDP, 동적 프로그래밍에서 출발하여 가치 기반/정책 기반 심층 강화학습, 모델 기반 RL, 멀티에이전트 RL, 오프라인 RL과 RLHF, 그리고 계층적 RL·메타 RL 등 최전선 주제까지 포괄한다.

curricula.name: Generative AI: Large Language Models, Diffusion Models, and AI Agents
curricula.instructor: Percy Liang, Danqi Chen, Graham Neubig, Dawn Song
prerequisites: Deep Learning fundamentals (backpropagation, CNNs, RNNs, Transformers)
curricula.description: 생성형 AI와 대형 언어 모델(LLM)의 이론, 학습 방법론, 응용을 체계적으로 다루는 커리큘럼. Stanford CS324, Princeton COS 597G, CMU Advanced NLP, Berkeley CS294 등 저명 대학의 최신 강의와 분야를 정의한 핵심 논문들을 기반으로 구성하였다.
